items.title: Controlling Reasoning Effort in LLMs
items.core_innovation: Explains training for low/med/high effort reasoning modes
items.significance: Clarifies mechanism behind adjustable inference-time compute

items.title: Distilled Reinforcement Learning for LLM Post-training
items.core_innovation: Hybrid RL+distillation fixing credit assignment & knowledge gain
items.significance: Addresses core weaknesses of both RLHF and on-policy distillation

items.title: SLPO: Scaling Latent Reasoning via a Surrogate Policy
items.core_innovation: RL scaling for latent (non-token) chain-of-thought reasoning
items.significance: Latent reasoning matches CoT at much lower decode cost

items.title: PoTRE: Test-Time Reasoning inspired by Cognitive Heterogeneity
items.significance: New pattern for robust long-horizon reasoning at inference

items.title: How Fast Can Reward Models Score? RLHF Runtime Study
items.core_invnovation: Systems benchmark of C++ vs PyTorch reward scoring engines
items.core_innovation: Systems benchmark of C++ vs PyTorch reward scoring engines
items.significance: Identifies real RLHF bottlenecks and freed-up compute gains

items.title: Efficient Clustering with Provable Guardrails for LLM Inference at Scale
items.core_innovation: Provably-bounded clustering to reuse LLM outputs across inputs
items.significance: Cuts inference cost at scale with quality guarantees

items.title: BaseRT: LLM Inference with Apple M5 Ne
